title: Anna's Create : New Tempest
description:
A Tensura Addon, adding a new Playable Race with Create Compatibility!
ORIGINAL BY : Lost From Sleep
body:
A 1.21.1 Neoforge Mod, based on the work of Lost From Sleep, who made the Original in 1.19

This mod adds a Tensura race with Create integrations, the Construct Race!

## Construct
Constructs are a Majin race with 2 Intrinsic Skills:
**Mechanical Eye.** Allowing you to view Create blocks as if through goggles, can be toggled on and off.
**Mechanical Hand.** Which has 2 Modes, Rotate and Remove. Works like a Create Wrench!

By getting enough Existance Points, you can evolve from a Construct to a Robot, increasing your stats. Then after robot, you can turn into a Golem, granting the Giantification Skill. Now you become a Greater Golem and eventually a Divine Golem!

## Configs!
This mod comes with Tensura Generated Configs, so you may configure the Race to fit your servers balance and/or playstyle. In order to make the Race selectable, make sure to edit the config found at config/tensura/reincarnation_config.toml and add "createtensura:construct" to your race settings!

## Credits!
**Big Thanks to Lost From Sleep for making the Original, and giving me permissions to make this reimagined version for a newer version!**
You can find them here! https://www.curseforge.com/members/lostfromsleep
